data.content:
Use `dotnet test --filter` with `&` to combine conditions:

```bash
dotnet test --filter "ClassName~OrderServiceTests & TestCategory=Unit"
```

This combines:
- **`ClassName~OrderServiceTests`** — matches the class name (using `~` for contains)
- **`TestCategory=Unit`** — matches only tests tagged `[TestCategory("Unit")]`
- **`&`** — logical AND

This will run only `CreateOrder_ValidInput_ReturnsOrder` and `CreateOrder_NullInput_ThrowsException`, skipping the two Integration tests and all `PaymentServiceTests`.
